docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HERNANDEZ, SILVIA AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS - CT CORPORATION SYSTEM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, SILVIA AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-29-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-17-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF SILVIA HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ANTHONY ROBINSON, CLAIMS REPRESENTATIVE. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE APRIL HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT'S. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
